title: GenerateSourcesOutput
description: Output of the generate-sources CLI. Reports tables classified as dbt sources (no_writer_found) vs. model targets (resolved).

sources.description: YAML-serialisable sources dict (version + sources entries). Null when no tables qualify as sources.

included.description: FQNs of tables included as dbt sources (scoping.status == 'no_writer_found').

excluded.description: FQNs of tables excluded because they are procedure targets (scoping.status == 'resolved').

incomplete.description: FQNs of tables with incomplete or missing scoping that were neither included nor excluded.

path.description: Absolute path to the written sources.yml file. Present only when --write is used. Null when sources is null.

error.description: Error code. Present only when the CLI encounters a domain or IO failure.

message.description: Human-readable error description. Present alongside error.
